entry.title: one step backward, two steps forward
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,009Chapters: 4/4Kudos: 9

Summary: "So, let me get this straight..." She said after a moment of silence, eyeing him. "Not only do you want to go back in time to prevent Scott from ever being bitten, you also want me to come with you so that I get bitten in his place?" OR: Stiles came up with a plan to go back in time with Lydia so that Scott never gets bitten, hoping that by doing so they would be able to save a lot of people they loved from pain and strife. They succeeded, to Stiles' surprise—because the idea had always been harebrained and risky and he knew it—so now Stiles has to grapple with what the next step of the plan is. Living in the new timeline he'd helped create and grappling with the ethics of pursuing a relationship with the timeline's Derek Hale, especially because he keeps seeing someone else—an older, more weary wolf from a much crueler timeline—in his shadow.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Time After Time
entry.summary:
Author: anarchycox

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 42,922Chapters: 4/6Kudos: 524

Summary: Talia told Noah about werewolves and the supernatural when he was elected Sheriff. He warned her that was a mistake and she didn't understand why, until she realized that that meant ten year old Stiles knew about werewolves. God help them all.A soft and slow burn story about the five times the Stilinskis saved the Hales over the years, and the one time they were saved right back.

entry.title: Coach’s Dirty Secret
entry.summary:
Author: notyourtipicalauthor

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,972Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 23

Summary: After a routine lacrosse practice, Stiles Stilinski is unexpectedly called into Coach Derek Hale’s office, expecting a scolding. Instead, he discovers his supposedly straight, married, and hunky coach has been hiding a very different kind of hunger. Basically, Stiles ends up fucking his hot older coach Derek Hale raw in the school office after practice. The married, muscular coach turns out to be an absolute cock-hungry slut for Stiles’s huge, teenage dick.

entry.title: The Secret Contract
entry.summary:
Author: esmrlda99

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,436Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 9

Summary: Shy, handsome 23-year-old Derek, the awkward son of ridiculously rich parents, has never even had a girlfriend. Worried he’s too timid and inexperienced, his parents secretly hire Stiles, a stunning slutty 30-year-old escort known for turning nervous men into confident lovers. They pay her a fortune for one rule: teach their son about flirting, desire, and sex… but never let him fall in love with her.

entry.title: They May Have Fallen But We Still Stand
entry.summary:
Author: Effra

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 82,588Chapters: 11/18Kudos: 164

Summary: Lieutenant Stiles Stilinski of the Nemetan rifle regiment can't find it in his heart to celebrate the end of the long and bloody war against the darachs. Perhaps it’s the faces that swim behind his eyelids, lost to time, dark magic and musket balls, or perhaps it’s the doubt he harbours that he can truly be good at anything except being a soldier. Regardless, as he huddles at one end of the bar, nursing an ale barely worthy of the name, he listens as the locals sing their songs and toast to the fallen. He doesn't think about the men he has lost, and he definitely doesn't think about alpha Lord Hale, leader of the Triskellan battle-pack, who was last seen leaping into the heart of the fighting with typical reckless heroism. Even if Hale had survived the battle, nothing could or would ever happen between them. Shifters were too different from humans - too wild, too strange. It didn't matter that Stiles felt like the only person who could see past the teeth and claws to the heart of the man beneath them. They were from two different worlds.

entry.summary:
Author: sync433

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 44,088Chapters: 22/?Kudos: 310

entry.title: I surrender who I've been for who you are
entry.summary:
Author: ichengxhun

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 18,659Chapters: 2/3Kudos: 110

Summary: When Sitles is born, he has a unique and distinctive mark just below his neck. In a society where the supernatural and magic are as ordinary as breathing, the concept of soulmates should be considered just as common; the thing is, it isn’t. Soulmates are reserved for outstanding and important figures in the world—for people with so much power in the palms of their hands that someone must exist to balance and share the burden of destiny.

entry.title: a problem that doesn't want to be solved
entry.summary:
Author: wishingonalightningbolt

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 67,463Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 274

Summary: Derek is an executive at Hale Publishing. Stiles is his assistant—his assistant who's 23 years younger than him. So Derek really shouldn't...notice him. The way that he does. -0- Stiles is attractive. Derek knows that. He’s not blind. Sometimes, not often, Derek finds himself—looking. Admiring. Stiles is tall and fit, broad shoulders that taper to a trim waist, an ass that Derek shouldn’t be checking out as often as he does, firm and high. Derek isn’t ignorant to his own fluid sexuality. He used to fuck men, back in the day, when he was twenty and single and easy. But then he was with Jennifer, and since the divorce it’s just seemed…less complicated. To date women. But he likes men—aesthetically. Sexually. He likes Stiles more than he should. And it’s weird not because he’s a man but because Derek has literally never had this problem before. He’s never been attracted to one of his assistants, ever. Then again, none of his assistants have been anything like Stiles.

entry.title: The Mage's Home
entry.summary:
Author: DaoOfGay

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,673Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 103

Summary: After a severe crash out and mental breakdown that resulted in him opening his soul and awakening it to his true power, Stiles is kicked out of Scott's pack by said Alpha. Years later, a much more mature and powerful Stiles receives an S.O.S message from a friend, and this time, he won't fail. Or; Stiles leaves Beacon Hills, makes his own pack, gets better, and returns to kick ass.

Author: Tigercher11
